query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN trial_ends_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_trial_end,
  SUM(CASE WHEN trial_ends_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_trial_end,
  SUM(CASE WHEN trial_ends_at < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trial_expired,
  SUM(CASE WHEN trial_ends_at >= NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trial_active,
  SUM(CASE WHEN subscription_status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paid_subscribers
FROM users;
